title: Support Triage (AI-assisted)
description: Build a support ticket triage system. Tickets have subject, body, from_email, category, priority, status. Use a Claude agent named 'Triage' that receives a ticket and returns a JSON object with {category, priority}. When a new ticket is POSTed, call the Triage agent to classify it before saving. Need: POST /api/tickets (auto-classifies), GET /api/tickets (list), GET /api/tickets/open.
skeleton:
build for web and javascript backend

create a Tickets table:
  subject, required
  body
  from_email
  category, default 'General'
  priority, default 'Normal'
  status, default 'open'

allow signup and login

# Define a Triage agent: agent 'Triage' receives ticket: ...
# Then POST /api/tickets calls the agent to classify category + priority before saving
# Also build a simple inbox page showing open tickets
